Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A user-posted comment on a specific section of the election guide.

authorId.description: UID of the user who posted the comment.

authorAvatar.description: URL to the author's profile image.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when the comment was created.

sectionId.description: The ID of the election phase or section (e.g., 'registration').

parentId.description: Optional ID of a parent comment for threaded replies.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Private profile data for a registered user.

comments.description: Global collection of comments for the application.

users/{userId}.description: User profile documents indexed by UID.
